items.name: GIMP
items.why: Open-source raster editor for photo compositing and asset prep when Photoshop isn't available.
tradeoffs: UI/UX is less polished than Adobe; advanced workflows can be slower.

items.name: Inkscape
items.why: Vector design for logos, icons, diagrams, and exportable brand assets.

items.name: Blender
items.why: 3D renders, motion, product shots, and compositing with a strong ecosystem.

items.name: Krita
items.why: Digital painting and illustration for bespoke visual language and campaign assets.

items.name: DaVinci Resolve
items.why: High-end editing + color grading; strong default for world-class video output.

items.name: FFmpeg
items.why: Deterministic media transforms (transcode, caption burn-in, audio normalize) for pipeline automation.
items.notes: License may vary by build configuration; ensure compliance for distribution.
